title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Reflective Patches for Safety, Jackets, Bike and Outdoor
description:
Use Tenacious Tape Reflective to increase visibility and improve safety at night for the whole family. This high vis fabric tape is easy to apply and uses glass bead technology to reflect light better than fluorescent tape. It sticks well to bikes, running shoes, bicycle gear, outerwear, and even hard hats and pet collars. The ultra-aggressive adhesive sticks to almost any surface without peeling. Be safer outside and be visible with Tenacious Tape Reflective Tape and Patches.

GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Reflective Patches for Safety, Jackets, Bike and Outdoor

Use Tenacious Tape Reflective to increase visibility and improve safety at night for the whole family. This high vis fabric tape is easy to apply and uses glass bead technology to reflect light better than fluorescent tape. It sticks well to bikes, running shoes, bicycle gear, outerwear, and even hard hats and pet collars. The ultra-aggressive adhesive sticks to almost any surface without peeling. Be safer outside and be visible with Tenacious Tape Reflective Tape and Patches.

Key Features

  • Be visible in low light environments and improve safety at night with Tenacious Tape Reflective, which features high-vis, glass bead technology
  • Peel-and-stick these reflective fabric tape/patches for running and bike gear, helmets, water bottles, shoes, jackets, backpacks, hard hats, and dog or cat collars
  • Apply this silver tape on outdoor/synthetic fabrics including nylon and vinyl; washable and won’t peel off over time
  • Cut to size the 3”x20” strip or stick on the various pre-cut patches to virtually any surface
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 10897
  • UPC: 021563108972
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 3 in x 20 in
